one_time_description: 150-year land lease agreement valued at $60,000,000 transferred to Kwaw-Kwaw-Apilt Development LP, recorded as deferred revenue to be recognized over the lease term
economic_notes: First Nation is involved in real property development via Kwaw-Kwaw-Apilt Development LP, forestry activities via Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry LP, property rental via Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Tribe Society, and property acquisition via Centre Creek LP. Also holds investments in pipeline (Western Indigenous Pipeline Group) and framing/construction entities with no activity yet recorded.
notes: Large one-time 150-year land lease valued at $60M recorded as deferred revenue and transferred to Kwaw-Kwaw-Apilt Development LP, significantly distorting cash flow and balance sheet. GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis include Centre Creek LP (11%), Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Forestry LP (12.36%), Ch-Ihl-Kway-Uhk Tribe Society (11.11%), and Kwaw-Kwaw-Apilt Development LP (100%). Pipeline and framing entities exist but have no recorded activity. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Prior year revenue of ~$13.1M included large interest/other revenue of $11.1M (likely a land claim or settlement). Deferred revenue jumped by $60M due to the lease agreement.
